title: Cylinder
description: Cylinder: A solid circular right angled cylinder.

Centre.description: Point defining the centre of the circular base. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

Axis.description: Vector perperdicular to the base. Defines the orientation in three-dimensional space. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Radius.description: Distance from the Axis to the Cylinder boundary surface. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Height.description: Distance between the base and top surface, measured along the Axis. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
